text: A reply brief contained fabricated quotations and additional misrepresentations. The Fifth Circuit found that AI-generated material had been filed without adequate verification and that counsel's response to the show-cause order compounded the problem.
ai_system_name: Generative AI, identified in reporting as Casetext/CoCounsel and/or vLex workflow
canonical_source_conflicted: Fifth Circuit record, quoted opinions, served Rule 11 materials
mitigation_gap: No independent verification of quotations or propositions before filing; show-cause response was evasive about AI authorship.
reliance_or_harm: Attorney sanctioned and ordered to pay $2,500 to the clerk.
